invariant: Readable source, traceability, security, PWA behavior, and reviewed Lighthouse baseline must stay aligned.
forbidden_moves: Do not hide evidence debt with unreadable runtime changes.

candidate.description: Restore readable runtime and refresh Lighthouse baseline from reviewed CI evidence.

expected_effect: Security, TRACE, Adversarial, Lighthouse, and AI review checks stay green.

orientation_center.reason: The transition preserves higher-priority invariants and has direct CI evidence.
orientation_center.next_allowed_move: Keep the PR review-ready and avoid unrelated mutations.

pattern: Baseline refresh is safe when hard assertions stay green.
risk: Future baseline updates need artifact evidence.

rule_update: Baseline refresh requires CI evidence and preserved hard assertions.
threshold_update: Acceptance requires green source-governance and performance checks.

exact_head_confidence.reason: Evidence is tied to the clean head.
